prestazioni: Engine: Turbocharged 1.4L MultiAir Turbo (MA14T) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded to a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a GESI 3-inch cat-back exhaust system featuring dual 4-inch titanium tips.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger and a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump. ECU reflash via HP Tuners with a custom tune by EuroCompulsion, targeting 280-300 WHP on 93 octane with a 22 psi peak boost level.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear), and a Cusco front strut tower bar. Brembo GT 355mm 6-piston front brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny 124 Spider widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders. Custom carbon fiber hardtop by Seibon with a gloss clear coat finish and integrated rear spoiler.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with Abarth Scorpion logos in gloss black. HRE FF01 wheels (18x9 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) in matte bronze, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats with custom red Alcantara inserts and FIAT Abarth embroidery. MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, NRG short shifter, and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries with bolt-in design for track use.
